properties.name: `nav-icons`
properties.description: Changes the Previous and Next buttons to chevron icons

properties.name: `pagesList`
properties.description: An immutable array that represents the current pagination's state

properties.name: `selected-index`
properties.description: Index of the currently selected page

properties.name: `shape`
properties.description: Sets the shapes of the navigation buttons

properties.name: `size`
properties.description: Sets the size of the navigation buttons

properties.name: `total`
properties.description: Total number of pages to navigate
